title: Up to 4 $9 Standard Movie Tickets (Including Booking Fee) + $0.40 Surcharge for Card Payments @ Toyota Go
body:
Deal: Up to 4 $9 Standard Movie Tickets (Including Booking Fee) + $0.40 Surcharge for Card Payments @ Toyota Go

[shmahoo] From previous versions of this promotion, it you booked for a weekday session you received weekday voucher (not valid on Fri/Sat nights. If you booked for peak time you received an unlimited voucher
[Poimandres] Confirmed this works. Get some tickets to a random movie Saturday after 5pm and you get unrestricted vouchers. Let's go!
[bargaineer12345] Can you explain more? how to know if session time is at peak time, and does it work for Hoyts as well?
[thedavemiester] Book any movie on a Saturday night and you'll receive an "unrestricted" voucher for hoyts and event
[Poimandres] Not sure about Hoyts, but Event cinemas charge extra after 5pm Saturdays.
With these tickets, you choose a movie, date, time then click through to checkout and they send you vouchers (valid for 12 months). If you choose a Saturday night session when you click through, they will send you "unrestricted" vouchers you can use for weekends without needing to pay a surcharge.
I assume Hoyts have something similar, because of course they want to fleece as much as possible from you.
[blahblah000] which cinemas and sessions are $9? keep getting full priced for hoyts and event cinemas
[JHoliday] Keeps showing as full price here too… I went all the way to the final checkout page
[JHoliday] Seems I need to add my vehicle again and this time upload rego certificate to verify
[ElectricMallet] One ticket? I can’t get the $9 price to apply for a single ticket purchase. Only works for two or more.
[ozzbargainer] Haven't purchased any after April but I keep getting this error
Only 4 vouchers can be purchased each calendar month.
[partypooper] I got around this by buying 2 tickets at a time
[ozzbargainer] I did that in my last purchase couple of months ago. Now it won't allow even one :(
[Dionnnn] Was able to sign up no car reg. Then sign up to toyota movies. Got 4 tickets in one go for this sat after 5pm. Received 4 unrestricted expiring next year. Thanks
[tunzafun001] Looks like a daughter trip to the new (albeit old) Moana movie
